nasb.text: The word which He sent to the sons of Israel, preaching peace through Jesus Christ (He is Lord of all)—

esv.text: As for the word that he sent to Israel, preaching good news of peace through Jesus Christ (he is Lord of all),

cnv.text: 神藉著耶穌基督傳和平的福音，把這道傳給以色列人。

ccb.text: 上帝借着万物的主宰——耶稣基督把平安的福音传给以色列人。

csbs.text: 神藉着耶稣基督——这一位就是万有之主——传和平的福音，把这话语赐给了以色列子民。
